name: Milky Way Galaxy (Baryonic Mass)
description: Baryonic mass of the Milky Way galaxy — stars, gas, and dust. Total ~100 billion solar masses (1.989e41 kg). Elemental composition by mass fraction from cosmic abundance surveys (H 70.8%, He 27.3%, O 0.85%, C 0.40%, Fe 0.14%, Ne 0.13%, N 0.10%, Si 0.09%, Mg 0.09%, S 0.05%, Ar 0.03%, Ca 0.02%). Does not include dark matter.
